name: gated-build
description: Scout plans a change, a HUMAN approves, then a builder applies it and a deterministic node verifies. Demonstrates requires_approval (human-in-the-loop): the run pauses before the builder until approve_gate grants it. Vars: {{goal}}.

nodes.prompt:
Recon the codebase and propose the MINIMAL change for: {{goal}}. Return a numbered plan only.
## findings
## confidence

nodes.run: echo 'replace this code node with your real deterministic check, e.g. npm test'
